approaches.title: Ability Method
approaches.blurb: Use one method to generate dice rolls and return ability values.

approaches.title: Dice Roll Static Method
approaches.blurb: Use a separate static method to conduct dice rolls.

approaches.title: Stand-alone Dice Roll Function
approaches.blurb: Create a dice roll function outside the Character class.

approaches.title: Loop and setattr in init
approaches.blurb: Use a tuple of attributes, a loop, and setattr in init to assign ability values.
